name: Beijing Enterprises Water Group Limited
summary: Beijing Enterprises Water Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides water services and environmental protection services. The company offers construction services for sewage, reclaimed water treatment, and seawater desalination plants, as well as for renovation projects. It also provides sewage and reclaimed water treatment services; and technical and consultancy services. In addition, the company is involved in the distribution and sale of piped water; sale of machineries related to sewage treatment; and licensing of technical know-how related to sewage treatment. It provides its services in the People's Republic of China, Malaysia, Australia, the Republic of Botswana, Singapore, and Portugal. The company was formerly known as Shang Hua Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Enterprises Water Group Limited in March 2008. Beijing Enterprises Water Group Limited is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
